亚马逊黄岛荒野求生。每一次探索都是在生命极限上的蹦迪，根本停不下来！","text_exts":[{"e":110,"s":107,"text":"哀牢山","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%93%80%E7%89%A2%E5%B1%B1&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774129967DE17D985%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227567979471795667737%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227546203460941663256%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%93%80%E7%89%A2%E5%B1%B1%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":137,"s":133,"text":"荒野求生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%8D%92%E9%87%8E%E6%B1%82%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774129967DE17D985%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227567979471795667737%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227546203460941663256%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%8D%92%E9%87%8E%E6%B1%82%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762059640,"group_id":"7546203460941663256","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不看有后宫文","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N86Yra0SN/SaZn69+sFpokE=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dd08f96b51c34189a4d458bfbc5354a5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705550&x-signature=yHdFOk5%2FowXHZTE%2BjM2VLBSoaHk%3D","user_id":"898714262312683","user_name":"一后年"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"898714262312683","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1755180193,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7546203460941663256","book_info":{"abstract":"【钓鱼佬】+【系统】+【专攻巨物】+【直播】
沐风——平平无奇一上班族，每天享受996福报的打工牛马。
但就在他被黑心老板压榨精神，黑心老板娘压榨身体之际，突然觉醒了最强钓鱼佬系统。
只要去系统指定的地方钓鱼，就能获得积分，从而兑换万物！
七斤翘嘴兑换300积分......
一百斤鲇鱼兑换6000积分......
十积分可兑换一百华夏币，可兑换鱼饵一份......
... ...
从此沐晨便是踏上了钓鱼佬，在全球寻找极品大鱼的不归路！
而第一个目标地点是：【十人进，一人出的哀牢山！！！】
... ...
很多年后，当沐风再一次出现于众人眼前时——
“我是沐风，生物学家兼极限钓鱼迷，水生生物侦探，出色的垂钓者。”
“我已经在世界各地垂钓数年。”
“哀牢山森林、长白山溶洞、长江急流、尼罗河食人鱼、深海鲨鱼......”
“作为一个合格的钓鱼佬，只有我不想钓的鱼，没有我钓不上来的鱼！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3430ff88de98da0b821cc8687139485f","author":"扑街小道人","author_id":"","book_id":"7546203460941663256","book_name":"钓鱼佬：开局哀牢山，钓鱼封神！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#384038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3532人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":493,"name":"钓鱼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=493&name=钓鱼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7546203492361175576","read_count":"3532","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"502045"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.3","serial_count":"231","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,体育,系统,直播,钓鱼,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2of9597bb624c1dd946baa72781de85b7d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779313967&x-signature=QvJ7B%2FzYCxCDPDHzsLN8jWLB25M%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4024650499633200","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"100"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220552471C0D0381C50EDE17D985"}"},"relate_info_list":
